title: Raccoon Removal in Massapequa Park, NY | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Massapequa Park, Long Island. Licensed experts serving residential areas near Brady Park & Marjorie Post Park. Call today for safe, humane removal. $900–$4,000.
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Massapequa Park's tree-lined neighborhoods, often nesting in attics, garages, and crawl spaces of the area's mid-century homes. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional, humane raccoon removal services throughout Massapequa Park and surrounding Long Island communities. Our licensed technicians safely remove raccoons, seal entry points, and prevent future intrusions to protect your property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Massapequa Park homeowners for years with fast, reliable raccoon removal services tailored to Long Island properties. Our team uses humane trapping methods, provides complete exclusion work, and offers warranties on our services to ensure your home stays raccoon-free.
localContext: Massapequa Park's residential neighborhoods, with mature trees near Brady Park and Marjorie Post Park, provide ideal habitats for raccoons seeking shelter and food sources. The area's Cape Cod and ranch-style homes are particularly vulnerable to attic and chimney intrusions, especially properties backing onto wooded areas or near Massapequa Creek.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Massapequa Park?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Massapequa Park typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, accessibility of nesting areas, and required exclusion work. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Massapequa Park neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Massapequa Park due to the abundance of mature trees, proximity to green spaces like Brady Park, and accessible food sources. They frequently inhabit attics, chimneys, and sheds in residential areas, particularly during breeding season from late winter through spring.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Massapequa Park home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Massapequa Park residents. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the situation, including initial trapping, ensuring all raccoons are removed (including juveniles), and sealing entry points to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane raccoon removal in Massapequa Park?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, live-capture trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Raccoons are safely relocated away from residential areas, and we never use harmful poisons or inhumane techniques. All our work includes thorough cleanup and sanitization of affected areas.
